sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n75936" key="ou)ranoeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">οὐρᾰνο-ειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n75936.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like the sky</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εἶδος χρώματος</foreign> Hsch.s.v.<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κυανόν</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
